description: Full-stack accounting platform for East Africa (Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, Burundi). Web + React Native + Electron desktop. Includes accounting-safe ledger, invoices, payroll, inventory, multi-branch, tax sync, and licensing.

modules.name: TransactionForm
modules.schema: Transaction{id, businessId, type, amount, vatRate, vatAmount, totalAmount, currency, categoryId, description, paymentMethod, transactionDate, reference, createdBy, createdAt, status}
modules.ledgerLogic: post to ledger with debit/credit ensuring total debits = total credits
modules.cursorPrompt: Generate TransactionForm module with offline-first, ledger posting, audit log, license gating. Include double-entry validation, VAT auto-calculation, and sync queue.

modules.name: InvoiceForm
modules.schema: Invoice{id, invoiceNumber, businessId, customerId, currency, issueDate, dueDate, status, subtotal, vatRate, vatAmount, totalAmount, balanceDue, items, notes, createdBy, createdAt, taxSyncStatus, reversalOf, reversedBy, complianceData}
modules.ledgerLogic: double-entry ledger posting on issue and payment, reversal creates inverse entries
modules.audit: log every state change (draft, issued, paid, reversed)
modules.taxSync: queue for EFRIS/TIMS/VFD/EBM, retry on failure, update entity taxSyncStatus
modules.offlineSupport: queue invoices offline, sync when network available
modules.cursorPrompt: Generate InvoiceForm module with double-entry ledger, audit log, reversal flow, offline tax authority sync. Include invoice numbering, payment tracking, and compliance data fields for TIMS/EFRIS/VFD/EBM.

modules.name: ChartOfAccounts
modules.schema: Account{id, code, name, type, currency, parentId, country, isTaxRelevant, isSystem, createdAt, updatedAt}
modules.cursorPrompt: Generate country-specific Chart of Accounts with tax flags and hierarchy for EA countries (Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, Burundi). Include default accounts per country, account type validation, and parent/child relationships.

modules.name: Payroll
modules.schema: Employee{id, name, employeeId, department, salary, taxRate, currency, country}, PayrollRun{id, month, year, employeeId, grossSalary, taxAmount, netSalary, status, ledgerPosted, createdAt}
modules.ledgerLogic: post payroll to ledger automatically (Debit: Salary Expense, Credit: Salary Payable + Tax Payable)
modules.cursorPrompt: Generate payroll module with country-specific taxes (PAYE, NHIF, NSSF for Kenya/Uganda/Tanzania), ledger posting, payslip generation, offline support. Include tax calculation engine per country.

modules.name: Inventory
modules.schema: InventoryItem{id, name, sku, cost, price, quantityOnHand, currency, ledgerAccountId, reorderLevel}, InventoryTransaction{id, itemId, type, quantity, cost, reference, createdAt}
modules.ledgerLogic: post COGS automatically on sale (Debit: COGS, Credit: Inventory)
modules.cursorPrompt: Generate inventory module tracking stock, calculating COGS (FIFO method), ledger integration, offline support. Include barcode scanning for mobile, low stock alerts, and multi-warehouse tracking.

modules.name: MultiBranch
modules.schema: Business{id, name, country, currency, branches}, Branch{id, name, businessId, location, ledgerAccounts, currency}
modules.cursorPrompt: Generate multi-branch support, consolidate ledger and reports per branch, support multi-currency, per-country VAT. Include inter-branch transfer tracking and consolidated reporting.

modules.name: ElectronInstaller
features: 7-screen wizard (Welcome, Deployment Type, Modules, Country, DB Setup, Summary, Complete)
Deployment type selection: Cloud / Private / On-Premise
modules.cursorPrompt: Generate Electron installer with multi-step wizard, license module gating, offline setup, local DB initialization, cross-platform (Windows/Mac/Linux). Include Docker Compose file generation for on-prem deployments.

workflow: Quick Action buttons open Transaction / Invoice / Payroll modals
Forms auto-save offline and queue sync
Tax Sync queue handles EFRIS/TIMS/VFD/EBM integration
Multi-branch consolidation available for enterprise accounts
Electron installer wraps web + RN modules for desktop deployment

licenseManagement.gatingLogic: Disable Quick Action buttons and modules if license not active

offlineSupport.web: localStorage queue for transactions, invoices, payroll, inventory adjustments
offlineSupport.mobile: AsyncStorage queue, sync worker, retry on reconnect
offlineSupport.desktop: local DB queue with Electron service worker

auditAndCompliance.auditLogSchema: AuditLog{id, entityType, entityId, action, before?, after?, performedBy, performedAt, metadata?}
auditAndCompliance.reversalFlow: Never delete posted records; create reversal entries linked to original

taxSync.queueSchema: TaxSyncQueue{id, entityType, entityId, payload, authority, status, retries, lastAttempt, errorMessage, syncedAt}
taxSync.workerLogic: Sync pending items to tax authorities, retry on failure, update status
